tender.description: E-Tender for pre-monsoon maintenance of prior to the rainy season of 33 KV, 11 kV HT LT lines, including cutting looping of tree branches, bush cutting, stay tightening, strengthening straightening of poles, conductor sagging, tightening UESD Charna
